$comment: Locveil commons docs manifest (HK-6/PROD-17; schema: process/user-docs/manifest.schema.json). Commons has no end-user classes (floor-where-exists) — its readers are contributors and integrators (the product repos' developers and the owner's sessions).

nodes.note: The umbrella's front door: what the commons is, the sibling map, where the board lives.
The contributor front door: links the normative process specs, the packages, the registry, the board conventions.
How the product repos consume the eval framework (YAML-first, make targets, file:// references).
The direction-labeled registry; per-contract READMEs hang off it under the contract-guard layout rules.

canonical.invariant: token values live in packages/ui-kit/tokens/locveil.css; the stylebook is their normative prose (PROD-10 style council 2026-07-14)
canonical.guard: none yet — rides ui-kit-v1 (a drift check between tokens.css and .json is the natural first guard)

nodes.note: The Locveil design system: blued-steel tokens, usage rules, the split icon ruling, fluid-layout requirement. Executable half: the ui-style skill.
